---
title: Annual General Meeting
toc: true
---

## 2026 Agenda

### Minutes

- [Draft
  Minutes](resources/Westman%20Naturalists%20Inc.%2C%20AGM%2C%20May%202%2C%202026%20Minutes.pdf),
  to be ratified in the 2027 AGM

### Agenda

1. Call to order
   - Welcome and introduction of board of directors
   - Overview of meeting and procedures
2. Review and approval meeting agenda
3. Approval of past AGM minutes
4. President's report
   - Summary and highlights of past activities
   - Goals and upcoming initiatives
5. Committee reports
   - Talks/presentations
   - Outings
   - Communications
   - Organization
   - Treasurer's report
   - Projected 2026 budget
6. Other business
7. Election of directors
   - Members at large
8. Adjournment
8. Nature walk
